title: FreshToHome Capital India is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Lead)

jsonLd.title: FreshToHome Capital India is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with FreshToHome Capital India! We are hiring a E-commerce Executive for our Noida team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About FreshToHome Capital India:
FreshToHome Capital India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Life and accident insurance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FreshToHome Capital India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
